chosen_action.title: Make guard-pause reuse actually work during unchanged empty-board windows

why_this_action.summary: The active loop kept emitting fresh distribution_architecture_guard_pause execution logs inside the same unchanged review window because legacy guard logs had no execution-board fingerprint and the staleness check treated auto-refreshed latest artifacts as semantic changes.
supporting_reasons: Current execution board still says no truthful do-now packet exists before 2026-05-26T08:57:00.
The post-hold rerun is already scheduled, so repeated guard-pause churn before then is fake progress.
A durable reuse fix improves the odds that the next active-loop pass reuses truth instead of minting another fresh pause artifact.
shared_findings_used: distribution_lane_latest.json: current lane is distribution_architecture_guard_pause with unchanged guard summary
marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now packet before 2026-05-26T08:57:00

result.summary: Patched guard execution logging to persist execution-board fingerprints, taught reuse lookup to accept matching legacy guard logs by semantic reason, and removed the mtime-based stale check that was invalidated by auto-refreshed latest artifacts.
